name: Coast Guard Air Station Clearwater
tagline: The Coast Guard's largest air station, flying search-and-rescue missions across the Gulf and Caribbean from Tampa Bay.
_note: Coast Guard Air Station Clearwater (Tampa Bay/Pinellas County, FL; at the St. Pete-Clearwater airport). CONUS full template (BAH MHA FL066 Tampa; RentCast/SchoolDigger work). CG uses same BAH tables. The CG's largest air station (HC-130 + MH-60). Medical: CG clinic + TRICARE network + nearby MacDill AFB MTF. Schools: Pinellas County. Facts verified from official sources (uscg.mil, TRICARE, CGX, Wikipedia for corroborated headline facts). Florida is TRICARE East. Medium-confidence flags: base coords (approx), off-base ZIP 33759 (Clearwater).

data.Distinction: The Coast Guard's largest air station
data.Mission: Search and rescue across the Gulf and Caribbean

sections.title: Mission & Identity
data: Coast Guard Air Station Clearwater is the service's largest air station, flying HC-130 aircraft and MH-60 helicopters on search-and-rescue and patrol missions across the Gulf of Mexico and the Caribbean.
It's in the Tampa Bay area in Pinellas County, near the St. Pete-Clearwater airport, pairing a busy aviation mission with Gulf beaches and an affordable-for-Florida cost of living.

sections.title: Tampa Bay Living: Beaches and Value

data.subtitle: Tampa Bay pairs Gulf beaches with a reasonable cost of living. The main choice is which Pinellas/Tampa-area community fits your commute, schools, and how close to the water you want to be.
intro: The Tampa Bay metro is affordable for a coastal area, with no state income tax, so BAH stretches reasonably. Coast Guard housing is limited, so most families live off base.
Where you live mostly comes down to commute and schools across Clearwater, Largo, St. Petersburg, and the Pinellas beaches, with Tampa across the bay.

recommendations.advice: Clearwater and Largo sit near the air station for a short commute.
Clearwater Beach and the Pinellas beach towns put you on the Gulf, busier and pricier.
St. Petersburg, Palm Harbor, and the northern Pinellas areas are popular with families.
Pasco County to the north trades a longer commute for lower prices.

sections.title: Gates & Access
data: Visitors without a DoD/CG ID need to check in at the visitor control point.
Gate hours and visitor requirements change, so confirm the current details on the official Coast Guard site before you go.

sections.title: On-Base Housing
data: Coast Guard family housing in the Tampa Bay area is limited, so most families live off base across Pinellas and the surrounding counties.
Eligibility and availability vary, so start with the Coast Guard housing office for current options and waitlists.

source.label: DoD 2026 BAH Rates, MHA FL066 (Tampa) — Coast Guard uses the same BAH tables

sections.title: Schools
data: There is no DoDEA district here; children attend the local civilian public schools. Pinellas County Schools serves Clearwater and the area, with Hillsborough (Tampa) and Pasco districts depending on where you live.
Your assigned schools depend on your address, so confirm the district and campus for any neighborhood you are considering.

data.Clinic: Coast Guard clinic, Air Station Clearwater
data.Care: On-base clinic care for the assigned population; family care via the TRICARE network and access to MacDill AFB's facility across the bay

data.Commissary: Nearest DoD commissary is at MacDill AFB (Tampa)

intro: Whether to rent or buy is the biggest money decision of most PCS moves, and Tampa Bay's affordability and no state income tax make buying a real option, especially with repeat tours.
rent: Your tour is short (about two years or less) or your orders feel uncertain.
You want time to learn the bay area and pick beachside versus inland.
You'd rather not gamble on resale timing or coastal insurance costs.
Your BAH comfortably covers rent in the areas you'd consider.
buy: You expect a longer tour or repeat Tampa Bay assignments.
You want to use your VA loan and build equity instead of paying rent.
The affordable Tampa Bay market fits your budget for a home you like.
You've found a neighborhood and commute you're confident about.
data.bottom_line: There is no universal right answer, but Tampa Bay's affordability and no income tax make buying worth a look for longer tours. Factor in Florida coastal insurance and run your BAH against the rent and home prices above, then talk to a lender and an agent who work with military families before you commit.

intro: The first month at a new duty station is mostly logistics. Knocking these out early makes everything else easier.

steps.title: Line up temporary lodging
steps.text: Book lodging or a short-term rental before you arrive. You can claim Temporary Lodging Expense (TLE) for a limited number of days while you house-hunt.

steps.title: In-process and update DEERS
steps.text: Report to your unit and finance, and make sure DEERS and ID cards are current for every family member so TRICARE and base access work.

steps.title: Check housing
steps.text: CG housing is limited; get the office's read on Pinellas and the bay area before you sign anything.

steps.title: Register your vehicle and sort access
steps.text: Handle base access and Florida vehicle registration, and learn the visitor process for guests. Bring your registration and insurance.

steps.title: Enroll the kids in school
steps.text: Contact the gaining district (Pinellas, Hillsborough, or Pasco) early and bring records and immunizations.

steps.title: Set up healthcare
steps.text: Update your TRICARE enrollment and pick a network provider; MacDill AFB's facility is across the bay.

data.a: It's the Coast Guard's largest air station, flying HC-130s and MH-60 helicopters on search-and-rescue and patrol missions across the Gulf and Caribbean.

data.q: Do Coast Guard families get BAH?
data.a: Yes, the same BAH tables as the rest of the military. Clearwater is MHA FL066 (Tampa).
Mostly off base across Pinellas County. Clearwater and Largo are closest; the beaches and St. Petersburg are popular; Pasco offers more value.
Reasonably, for a coastal area, helped by no Florida state income tax. Factor in coastal insurance if you buy.
